rationale: Both G1 round-1 runnability objections are addressed at 943cc310. The Bead 4 manual e2e now records git status after create and diffs it after verify, proving verify adds no new dirt instead of requiring a clean tree after create's expected writes. It also defines a reproducible sub-threshold tally setup by seeding expected reviewer verdict files with approve count one below ApproveThreshold. The leaf invariant now uses the two-step go-list form in the testing strategy, Bead 1, Bead 4, and the coverage map, so go list failures cannot false-green behind a negated grep. Spot-checking the new and changed verification checkboxes found no new unrunnable command.

findings.round_1_item: Rewrite the Bead-4 manual e2e into explicit commands that either commit/snapshot the files created by panel create before running verify, or compare git status before/after verify, and include the exact sub-threshold verdict setup before tally.
findings.detail: The e2e is now ordered: build the branch binary, create the panel, capture post-create git status to /tmp/before.txt, run verify, capture /tmp/after.txt, and diff the two files. The sub-threshold tally setup now specifies expected reviewer verdict files with APPROVE count exactly one below ApproveThreshold, including the default 4 APPROVE / 2 REQUEST_CHANGES example for a 5-of-6 threshold.

findings.round_1_item: Replace the leaf assertion with a form that fails when go list fails, for example `deps=$(go list -deps ./internal/panel) && ! printf '%s\n' "$deps" | grep -q internal/config`, or an equivalent two-step check.
findings.detail: The plan explains the false-green trap and uses `deps=$(go list -deps ./internal/panel) && ! printf '%s\n' "$deps" | grep -q internal/config` in Bead 1, Bead 4, and the acceptance coverage map. A failing go list now fails the command before grep is evaluated.

findings.round_1_item: Sanity-check new or changed verification checkboxes for newly unrunnable commands.
findings.detail: Spot-checked the changed verification checkboxes, including the new BRIEF marker test, branch-built validate self-check, Bead 4 PASS-line greps, two-step go-list assertions, skills greps, mirror diff, and manual e2e. No new unrunnable verification command was found.
